seoDescription: Website about SDGs, curated videos, SDG 5 self-assessment, and further-reading resources for Computer Engineering audiences.
heroTitle: Sustainable development goals through a Computer Engineering lens
heroLead: Browse videos, complete a self-assessment focused on gender equality, and go deeper with resources classified by difficulty and reading time.
heroNote: The interface is multilingual. Some materials remain in Spanish to preserve their original wording.

sections.overviewLead: The site covers SDGs 4, 5, 7, 8, 9, 11, 12, 13 and 16, with SDG 5 as the main focus for self-assessment and further reading.
sections.videosLead: Each block gathers videos related to each SDG, including authorship, license, subtitles and tone. The two planned SDG 5 videos do not have a public link available yet.
sections.quizLead: The question bank includes 8 questions about SDG 5. Each attempt shows 5 questions: 2 informative and 3 motivational.
sections.deepeningLead: Resources are grouped by SDG, with summary, difficulty and reading time. For SDG 5, they are organized into two subtopics.

labels.plannedNote: These two SDG 5 videos are planned, but no public link is available yet.
labels.quizSource: Each attempt mixes informative and motivational questions with immediate feedback.
labels.noFailedQuestions: There are no failed questions in this attempt.

quizUi.missingAnswers: Answer every question before checking the attempt.
quizUi.selectedModel: Applied model: 5 questions per attempt, with per-error feedback and a result category.
